variants.title: HiFi Filter SC 50141 Cabin Filter Category 2 | Replaces the Mann Filter SA 17118 HABITACLE
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter SC 50141 Cabin Filter Category 2 is HiFi's replacement to the Mann Filter SA 17118 HABITACLE. Easy to install and replace, the SC 50141 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
